refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and represent the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the broad requirement into specific analysis tasks ensures clarity and targeted verification for terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by generating a digital worksite model/map that includes terrain contours, obstacle locations, and delineated work zones, validated against ground truth data.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent the work-zone boundaries and relevant operational areas.

candidate_dps: DP1: Terrain analysis module using LIDAR and sensor fusion.
DP2: Obstacle detection algorithm leveraging computer vision and sensor data.
DP3: Work-zone mapping and representation using GIS-based modeling.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Terrain analysis module using LIDAR and sensor fusion; DP2: Obstacle detection algorithm leveraging computer vision and sensor data; DP3: Work-zone mapping and representation using GIS-based modeling.

potential_sources: Data dependency between terrain and obstacle analysis modules.
Shared data formats for work-zone representation.
coupling_check.notes: The DPs are logically distinct but require well-defined data interfaces to avoid tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-fidelity sensor data (LIDAR, cameras).
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting model quality.
Risk of integration complexity between terrain and obstacle analysis.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor data preprocessing to reduce coupling and improve data consistency.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level module responsible for integrating terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, cameras) for terrain and obstacle analysis.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to planning and execution modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote modules and teleoperation systems.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the worksite mapping is core to NGHE; low diffusion risk.
Limited containment; risk of diffusion if mapping logic is embedded in vehicle control.
Minimal containment; high diffusion risk if mapping is duplicated here.
Not appropriate for mapping; high diffusion risk.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite mapping in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports integration with planning and safety functions.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if NGHE Solution module becomes too large.
Risk of interface complexity with multiple data sources.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module size and consider sub-modularization within NGHE Solution if complexity grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FRs are well decomposed and mapped to logically distinct DPs with clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Low risk of diffusion by centralizing mapping in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as the best ownership candidate.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed at the NGHE Solution module level by validating the integrated worksite model.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to DPs and IM boundary with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Consider defining sub-modules within NGHE Solution for terrain, obstacle, and work-zone mapping to manage complexity.
Refine interface definitions for sensor data preprocessing.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition is sufficient with clear FRs, DPs, and IM assignment. Interfaces and containment are well defined with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and characterize obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Represent the work-zone boundaries and relevant operational areas.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: High-fidelity sensor data is available and reliable.
NGHE Solution module can handle integration complexity.
open_risks: Sensor data inaccuracies impacting model quality.
Potential performance bottlenecks in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks of NGHE Solution module.
